titleStmt.title: SII 7.143: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 143. (A.R. No. 130 of 1900). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyil ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi villavar nilaikeṭa minavar kulaitara Ēnaimannavar Iriyaluṟ ṟiḻitara tikkaṉaittu nta
ṉ(c) cakkara naṭātti vicaiyābhi [ṣekam] paṇṇi virasiṁhāsana ttu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya cakra vattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade- vaṟku yāṇṭu muppattiraṇṭāvatu milāṭākiya jananātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik
kūṟṟattut tirukkovalūrāṉa śrīmaturan=ta kaccaturvve timaṅkalattut tiruviṭaikaḻiāḻvāṉ koyilil Eḻun=ta ruḷina maṇavāḷāḻvāṉaiyum pirāṭṭiyaiyum jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu
kkoṭṭattu ciyapuranāṭṭu Aḷakūr vijaiyanalluḻāṉ ciriḷaṅkopperiyaveḷāṉ viṇṇappañ ceytu Amutuceytaruḷa niman=ta ñ ceytapaṭi nāḷ 1- kkut tirupponakap paḻavarici patakkukkunellu Ayṅkuṟuṇi
yūm kaṟiyamutukku nānāḻiyum Uppamutukku nāḻiyūm miḷakamutukku nānāḻiyūm neyyamutu Uḻakkāḻākkukku kuṟiṇi nānāḻiyum tayiramutu Irunāḻikku nānāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu patiṉāṟukkum Ilaiyamutu nāṟpatukkum nellu mu
ṉnāḻiyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu Irutūṇi muṉṉāḻiyum Ulakaḷan=tā ṉmarakkā(l)lāl celvitākavum nāḷ Oṉṟukkkuc can=ta ṉakkāppu Araikkaḻañcum Iṉnellum celkaikku Ipperiyaveḷāṉ ceyvitta tiruna
n=ta vānam rājentra coḻanil kamukum teṅkum koṇṭu celvitāka niman=ta ṅkaṭṭiThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 7.143 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
